title: Assistant Manager, Talent Success & HR Ops
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

World Mode Singapore is a specialist retail consultancy providing end-to-end integrated solutions for retail professionals and clients. As a wholly-owned subsidiary of World Mode Holdings Co. Ltd, Japan’s leading retail consultancy in Beauty and Fashion industries, we deliver personalized talent assessment and curated training programs to enhance skills and career growth. Our comprehensive human resource services include permanent placement, temp/contract placement, outsourcing, mass hiring projects, training consultation, and work pass/payroll services across multiple countries.

Job Summary

As Assistant Manager in Talent Success and HR Operations, you will drive business growth by fulfilling client hiring needs and aligning jobseekers’ career aspirations within the retail industry. You will lead project sales cycles, foster client and talent relationships, and manage comprehensive HR administration for outsourced, temporary, and part-time staff.

Responsibilities

  • Identify and mine data to generate leads and uncover candidate talents, match and recommend tailored services to meet client needs
  • Independently generate and develop new candidates through cold calls, face-to-face visits, and professional networking
  • Manage the entire recruitment cycle from lead generation to appointing candidates to projects, ensuring alignment with company objectives and sales targets
  • Identify key decision makers and leverage opportunities to promote and cross-sell services effectively
  • Analyze and share market insights while preparing and tabulating monthly project reports for team review
  • Collaborate with Business Consultants and Training Teams to deliver integrated client solutions
  • Support sales presentations and cultivate strong relationships with clients and talents to enhance engagement
  • Assist in event planning by managing deadlines and budget constraints to ensure successful execution
  • Facilitate collaborations and partnerships with schools, external vendors, and suppliers to expand service reach
  • Administer HR operations including collating part-time staff timesheets and ensuring compliance with statutory requirements
  • Liaise closely with clients on all HR-related matters to maintain smooth operational workflows
  • Prepare payroll summaries for submission to payroll processing teams accurately and timely
  • Manage onboarding and offboarding processes for all new joiners, ensuring compliance and smooth transitions for Retail pop-ups
  • Administer HR processes such as employment contract preparation, work pass applications and renewals, employee confirmations, and leave administration
  • Update and maintain Employee Handbook, Safety Measurement SOPs, and other HR documentation to reflect current policies
  • Monitor attendance, timekeeping and HR systems, proposing improvements aligned with business needs
  • Maintain strict confidentiality and privacy of personal and sensitive data in all HR activities
  • Perform additional HR-related duties as assigned to support organizational effectiveness

Required competencies and certifications

  • Diploma in Sales, Marketing, HR, or equivalent
  • CEI Licensed

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Strategic and analytical thinking to drive business decisions and team collaboration
  • Result-oriented and sales-driven mindset with resilience to overcome challenges
  • Strong interpersonal skills to build and maintain professional relationships
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment

postedCompany.description:
iDA'SG is now known as World Mode Singapore.


World Mode Singapore is a specialist retail consultancy with end-to-end integrated solutions for retail professionals and retail clients. We are a wholly-owned subsidiary of World Mode Holdings Co. Ltd, a Japanese retail consultancy with a strong track record and largest market share of recruiting retail professionals for Japan's Beauty and Fashion industries. We meet each talent personally to assess their skill sets and understand their career interests before matching the right talents to the clients. Pursuing beyond the capabilities of a recruitment agency, we offer specially curated training programmes for talents to enhance their skills through blended learning.


We offer total human resource services solution that includes:

  • Permanent Placement
  • Temp/Contract Placement
  • Outsourcing Placement
  • Bulk/Mass Hiring Projects
  • Training Consultation
  • Work Pass/Payroll Services

Our mission is to fulfil the career dreams of individuals; believing happy retail professionals bring about happy shoppers and happy retail businesses.


We have 29 offices in Japan and in 5 countries (Singapore, Malaysia, Vietnam, Taiwan and Australia).
postedCompany.name: WORLD MODE SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
